query:
INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_llms.user_insights (
                    id,
                    tenant_id,
                    user_id,
                    summary,
                    confidence,
                    started_at,
                    ended_at,
                    message_count,
                    cluster_keywords,
                    last_generated_at,
                    created_at,
                    updated_at
                )
                VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
